title: Result - Italy
content:
Welcome to Italy, a country rich in history, culture and natural beauty. Home to over 4,500 museums and 53 UNESCO World Heritage Sites, it offers treasures like Florence’s iconic art and culinary traditions unique to every region.
Explore stunning beaches, mountains, volcanoes and natural parks while savoring world-class wine and cuisine. Italy is also a leader in exports, energy efficiency and industrial recycling, with a thriving green economy and cutting-edge innovation in robotics, neuroscience and archaeology. From its art and history to its modern achievements, Italy promises an unforgettable experience.

## Unique food tradition
Pasta: comes in many forms, shapes and textures—over 500 cuts in Italy.
Italy has a diverse economy, with strong industries in fashion, tourism, agriculture, digital innovation, and manufacturing.

### Local legend or myth
Romulus and Remus: twin brothers in Roman mythology saved by a she-wolf after being abandoned by their mother. They founded the city of Rome, but a dispute led Romulus to kill Remus, becoming the first ruler of Rome.

### Language of the Land
The Italian alphabet only has 21 letters.
UNESCO sites - ranging from historic cities to landscapes and even cultural practices - make Italy the leader on the World Heritage list.
